title: ilex pseudobuxus
intro: Ilex pseudobuxus, also known as the Japanese boxwood or Japanese box, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Ilex pseudobuxus is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions or decoctions, and its extracts have been studied for potential therapeutic applications.
